Steps from Montauk Harbor

An East End Experience
at the edge of the harbor.

Family-owned and ideally placed for water and land lovers alike — moments from the Sound beaches, the boat-to-table seafood docks, and the lighthouse drive.

Welcome

The place to be in Montauk.

Harborside Resort Motel sits at the scenic edge of Montauk Harbor — a true visitor's paradise for travelers heading to the East End and the Hamptons. Family-owned, locally run, and built around a fun, easy-going atmosphere.

Step off the property and you're a short walk from the row of boat-to-table seafood restaurants, the Sound beaches, and the harbor jetties where the sunsets put on their nightly show. The REAL Montauk — minus the pretense.

2Block-Island
Sound Beaches
5minto Harbor
Restaurants
∞Free
Parking
Where the harbor begins

Wake to the boats. Walk to the water.

Mornings begin with coffee and the rhythm of the marina. Afternoons unfold poolside or on a stroll through the village. Evenings end with a short walk down West Lake to a fresh-caught dinner — and a sunset over the jetties that you'll remember long after you've gone home.

66+Years on the harbor
2Pool & tennis on site
1Block from the Sound
Stay With Us

Quiet, impeccably clean, and tastefully furnished.

Choose from rooms and efficiencies sized for couples, families, and longer Montauk weekends. Every room includes free Wi-Fi, AC, flat-screen TVs with HBO, and refrigerators.

01

The Standard

Two Beds Sleeps 4 Sound-Side

Two beds, a clean coastal palette, and the essentials that make a Montauk weekend simple — AC, fridge, flat-screen with HBO, and free Wi-Fi.

View Rates
02

The Renovated Double

Two Beds Sleeps 4 Updated

Refreshed interiors with a classic East End feel — wood floors, plaid bedding, and a touch of New England warmth for guests who like it traditional.

View Rates
03

The Corner Suite

Two Beds Sleeps 4 Bright Corner

A sunlit corner room with windows on two sides — ideal for travelers who want morning light and a little extra room to breathe between adventures.

View Rates
On the Property

Easy days. Better nights.

Everything you need for a Montauk weekend, none of the things you don't.

Outdoor Pool

Spend your afternoons poolside in the courtyard, just steps from your door.

Tennis & Pickleball

Professional all-weather court for tennis and pickleball — racquets ready when you are.

Free Wi-Fi

Unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi in every room and across the property.

Free Parking

Plenty of free on-site parking — bring the car, leave the hassle behind.

Air Conditioning

Every room is air-conditioned — sleep well after a long day in the sun.

Flat-Screen TVs

Every room includes a flat-screen TV with HBO and standard cable.

Refrigerators

In-room fridge — handy for snacks, drinks, and a stash of fresh-caught seafood.

Daily Service

Daily housekeeping keeps your room fresh — leave the chores to us.

A Closer Look

The pool, the rooms, the harbor.

Real photos from the property — the pool deck, the rooms, and the marina view that makes it Harborside.

Find Us

The harbor side of Montauk.

Set on West Lake Drive, just past the Captain's Cove and a few minutes from the Lighthouse. Walk the jetties at sunset, ride into town for breakfast, then come home and float the afternoon away.
